articles.title_en: Fires in Chornobyl exclusion zone send toxic smoke over Kyiv. Ukraine says crashed Russian drones started them.
articles.lead_en: Wildfires in the Chornobyl Exclusion Zone worsened air quality in Kyiv and several districts of the Kyiv region, the Ukrainian Hydrometeorological Institute reported on June 29.
articles.title_raw: Fires in Chornobyl exclusion zone send toxic smoke over Kyiv. Ukraine says crashed Russian drones started them.
articles.lead_raw: Wildfires in the Chornobyl Exclusion Zone worsened air quality in Kyiv and several districts of the Kyiv region, the Ukrainian Hydrometeorological Institute reported on June 29.
